channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Vanderbilt beats Georgia Tech 35-27 in Birmingham Bowl for first postseason win in 11 years
item.description: Diego Pavia threw three touchdown passes and ran for two more scores and Vanderbilt secured its first winning season since 2013 with a 35-27 victory over Georgia Tech on Friday in the Birmingham Bowl.
item.dc:creator: John Zenor, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: NBA coaches react with dismay over firing of 2-time coach of the year Mike Brown
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Not even two years ago, Rick Carlisle publicly lauded Mike Brown for the job he did on the way to winning the NBA's coach of the year award. And on Friday, Carlisle was among the coaches reacting with dismay that Brown was fired.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Depleted Notre Dame defense hopes to make an impact against Georgia in CFP quarterfinals
item.description: SOUTH BEND, Ind. (AP) — Notre Dame’s defense set a dominating tone early in its College Football Playoff opener against Indiana. The Fighting Irish stuffed the highest-scoring team in the CFP field for a 14-3 halftime lead, but then Notre Dame suffered a gut punch.
item.dc:creator: CURT RALLO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eagles' Nick Sirianni clears the air after heated postgame confrontation with former player Zach Ertz
item.description: Philadelphia Eagles head coach Nick Sirianni said Thursday that he and former Eagles player Zach Ertz, now with the Washington Commanders, are all good after they got into a postgame confrontation following the Eagles' loss to the Commanders on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sharks without key forward for game vs. Golden Knights
item.description: NHL: San Jose Sharks begin post-Christmas schedule with game against Tomas Hertl, Vegas Golden Knights
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Former Central Michigan quarterback Tommy Lazzaro, 27, killed in hunting accident
item.description: Former Central Michigan quarterback Tommy Lazzaro, who served as a sergeant in the U.S. Army, was tragically killed in a hunting accident over the weekend.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bulls take on the Bucks on 3-game skid
item.description: Milwaukee Bucks (16-13, fifth in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (13-18, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Chicago enters the matchup against Milwaukee after losing three straight games. The Bulls are 2-5 against division opponents.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Alex Ovechkin is on track to break Wayne Gretzky's NHL career goals record
item.description: Alex Ovechkin of the Washington Capitals is closing in on the NHL career goals record of 894 held by Wayne Gretzky. Ovechkin has 868 goals after scoring 15 in the first 18 games this season. He needs 27 to set a new record.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 2 sailors die in the stormy first night of the Sydney to Hobart yacht race, organizers say
item.description: Two sailors on separate boats have died in boom accidents two hours apart on a storm-ravaged first night of the annual Sydney to Hobart race, adding to the event's long history of deaths at sea.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS PASSA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cathedral Catholic goalie shows why she's a keeper; honors her coach through art
item.description: Cathedral Catholic's 4-year starting goalie Maria'O Brien expresses her love to her head soccer coach through art. Suprising and touching longtime Cathedral Coach Dawn Lee.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5
